headline: Tuesday, Day 185 — IST morning, and yesterday was the Monday three weeks of briefs pointed at: IRS call + the $0 HR email, both in Frankie's 8 AM PT window. No result has surfaced anywhere we can see (inbox silent 48h), so today's cheapest truth-finder is a one-line founder report: did either tap fire? Meanwhile the IST lane has its own 6-minute unlock — the Full Disk Access toggle (autoloop day 16 frozen at cycle 10, today's 09:00 retry is the live test) plus the ATTOM key overwrite.

spotlight.title: The 6-minute IST unlock: Full Disk Access toggle + ATTOM key
spotlight.detail: Autoloop is frozen at cycle 10 for the 16th straight day; every 09:00 IST retry has failed since Jun 28. The fix is a 5-min System Settings toggle — do it before 09:00 and today's retry becomes the live test. While in there: 1-min ATTOM key refresh (new key at api.developer.attomdata.com → overwrite .oraya-credentials/attom_api_key).

spotlight.title: Close the loop on Monday: did the IRS call and the HR email fire?
spotlight.detail: Yesterday 8 AM PT both doors opened — the IRS line (RedFax window closed Friday with no reply, so the EIN gets called for) and the HR inboxes that make the $0 B2B email sendable. Inbox shows nothing in 48h, which proves nothing either way. One WhatsApp line settles it; if neither fired, Tuesday 8 AM PT is the identical pair of free taps.

spotlight.title: BatchData ~$25 — the cheapest paid unlock still parked
spotlight.detail: Token already created and tested; funding skip-traces the 77 HOF TIER1 leads, appends emails, and switches on the cold-email lane. Pairs with Lob (~$50-70, Frankie) for the postcard path to a first booked appointment.

blockers.label: EIN
blockers.detail: Fax window closed Fri Jul 10 with no reply; Mon Jul 13 was call-day but no outcome has been reported. Until a founder confirms the IRS call result, the A2P → FBN → SMS chain stays parked. Unblock: Frankie reports Monday's result; if no call happened, dial at 8 AM PT today.

blockers.label: Launch gates
blockers.detail: Five founder taps still open from the Jun 28 board — B2B HR email ($0), Lob postcard (~$50-70), launch values intake, ATTOM key, BatchData (~$25). Every built lane (07 opt-in, 08 outreach, 09 B2B HR) is waiting on these, not on code.

blockers.label: Autoloop scheduler
blockers.detail: Day 16 frozen at cycle 10. macOS Full Disk Access toggle for the launchd runner — 5 minutes, done once. Today's 09:00 IST retry passes the moment it's granted.

tasks.lead: WALK INTO ENVISION HONDA MILPITAS · 1 PM PT
tasks.detail: suited up, fresh haircut, iPad with the Oraya-branded dealership deck. Ask for Greg (introduced you on phone yesterday) then GSM Mo. Reciprocity opener: "I'm semi-interested in the Prologue hybrid — mind if I poke around while we talk?" — lower the sales-resistance, demo the system on iPad once warm. Calendar event already created with location pinned + Chitraksh on as optional.

tasks.detail: on at least 2 fresh test scenarios · pretend-flow on inbound: voicemail callback → opt-in → calendar slot. Confirm calendar event, email confirmation, SMS — all three — land on each test.
(mailed May 22) · expected Thursday or Friday landing. The moment it hits, A2P submits.

tasks.detail: confirm the outbound-snippet ported in worked correctly. If clean, tomorrow morning kick off the first 60-lead outbound batch.

Chitraksh on standby in case Frankie needs a live G-Meet pull-in for live demo or live Q&A. Have outbound voice agent on demo-mode ready to dial Frankie's phone for in-person playback.

tasks.detail: from the Mercedes offer letter · Oraya UI / logo / color scheme · capability matrix · deliverables on PDF for Frankie's iPad.

port the single-prompt agent (archived from P2 fork) into the investor-blast prototype · ingest the Oraya site clone visual as the deal-card UI reference · scaffold a Postgres schema for the investor DB + the seller-contract DB.

queue providers, prepare SoS filing, synchronized public-facing address flip the moment A2P approves.
